cases.description: Verify video thumbnails indicate video content.
steps: 1. Install and launch the app. 2. Verify Splash Screen with HP logo and "sprocket". 3. Wait for splash to complete. 4. Tap Get Started. 5. Tap Sign Up Later. 6. Wait for Home screen. 7. Allow notification permission (if displayed). 8. Tap Quick Print. 9. Verify Gallery permission popup and tap Allow. 10. Verify bottom toast message is displayed for 5 seconds. 11. Navigate to Gallery. 12. Observe video thumbnails in folders.
cases.expected: Video thumbnails display a play icon at the bottom-right indicating video content.

verifications.description: Verify video thumbnails indicate video content.
verifications.expected: Video thumbnails display a play icon at the bottom-right indicating video content.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

cases.description: Verify AI tool restrictions for video frames.
steps: 1. Perform Video frame 01 steps. 2. Select a video. 3. Open Print Preview. 4. Verify top bar shows Back, connected printer name or No Printer Added, and Share icon. 5. Verify video preview with Play icon in the center. 6. Verify first video frame is selected by default. 7. Verify Copies tab is selected by default and Tiles option is available. 8. Verify AI button is disabled. 9. Tap the purple AI button.
cases.expected: AI button remains disabled and warning indicates AI editing is not available for video frames.

verifications.description: Verify AI tool restrictions for video frames.
verifications.expected: AI button remains disabled and warning indicates AI editing is not available for video frames.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

cases.description: Verify full E2E flow: Multi-select (photos/videos), previewing, AI restrictions, playback, and editing.
steps: 1. Perform Video frame 01 steps. 2. Select photos and videos. 3. Verify selection counter. 4. Tap Print Preview. 5. Verify top bar (Back, Printer Name/No Printer Added, Share). 6. Verify video preview with Play icon. 7. Verify first video frame is selected by default. 8. Verify Copies is selected and Tiles option is available. 9. Verify AI button is disabled. 10. Play the video. 11. Scrub to another frame. 12. Apply edits and change frame.
cases.expected: Multi-selection works correctly. AI is disabled for video frames. Playback and frame selection work as expected. Previous edits are discarded when frame changes.

verifications.description: Verify full E2E flow: Multi-select (photos/videos), previewing, AI restrictions, playback, and editing.
verifications.expected: Multi-selection works correctly. AI is disabled for video frames. Playback and frame selection work as expected. Previous edits are discarded when frame changes.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

steps: 1. Perform Video frame 01 steps. 2. Select a video and open Print Preview. 3. Verify video preview screen. 4. Tap Play. 5. Use playback bar to scrub between frames.
cases.expected: Video plays smoothly and selected frame updates correctly while scrubbing.

verifications.expected: Video plays smoothly and selected frame updates correctly while scrubbing.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

cases.description: Verify frame editing and discard behavior.
steps: 1. Perform Video frame 01 steps. 2. Select a video and open Print Preview. 3. Pause at a specific frame. 4. Tap Edit and apply edits. 5. Return to Print Preview. 6. Change frame using playback bar.
cases.expected: Changing the frame discards previously applied edits automatically.

verifications.description: Verify frame editing and discard behavior.
verifications.expected: Changing the frame discards previously applied edits automatically.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

cases.description: Verify UI restrictions during playback in Tiles mode.
steps: 1. Perform Video frame 01 steps. 2. Open Print Preview. 3. Verify Copies is selected by default and Tiles option is available. 4. Select Tiles mode. 5. Play the video. 6. Attempt to move, resize, or rotate the frame while playing.
cases.expected: Layout modifications and copy count adjustments are restricted while video playback is active.

verifications.description: Verify UI restrictions during playback in Tiles mode.
verifications.expected: Layout modifications and copy count adjustments are restricted while video playback is active.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

steps: 1. Launch application and wait for splash screen to complete.
2. Complete onboarding (ON_01B–ON_01E).
3. Tap Get Started → Sign Up Later.
4. Navigate to Create → AI Tools (CR_16A).
5. Select Ready-to-Generate tool (Remove Background / Replace Background / Restore Photo / Enhance Photo / Fix Lighting / Upscale Photo).
6. Select video from Gallery (CR_16A.1_Select Image from Gallery).
7. CR_16A.4_Select Video Frame screen opens.
8. Verify top left Back Arrow icon and "Select Frame" title.
9. Verify video preview, timeline thumbnails and Next button are displayed.
10. Select required video frame from timeline.
11. Tap Next.
cases.expected: User navigates to CR_16A.2_Preview Image - Ready to Generate screen.

verifications.expected: User navigates to CR_16A.2_Preview Image - Ready to Generate screen.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

cases.description: Verify routing to Next Step workflow
steps: 1. Launch application and wait for splash screen to complete.
2. Complete onboarding (ON_01B–ON_01E).
3. Tap Get Started → Sign Up Later.
4. Navigate to Create → AI Tools (CR_16A).
5. Select Next Step tool (Remove Object / Replace Object / Grab Object / Extend Image / Generate Object).
6. Select video from Gallery (CR_16A.1_Select Image from Gallery).
7. CR_16A.4_Select Video Frame screen opens.
8. Verify top left Back Arrow icon and "Select Frame" title.
9. Verify video preview, timeline thumbnails and Next button are displayed.
10. Select required video frame from timeline.
11. Tap Next.
cases.expected: User navigates to CR_16A.3_Preview Image - Next Step screen.

verifications.description: Verify routing to Next Step workflow
verifications.expected: User navigates to CR_16A.3_Preview Image - Next Step screen.
